---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for VoltPhish
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

### Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way today?
<!-- e.g. "As an operator running a monthly program, I can't ..." -->

### Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

### Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why they fall short.

### Scope check (defensive-use tool)

VoltPhish is an **authorized** phishing-simulation & security-awareness
platform. Please confirm the request keeps that scope:

- [ ] This is for authorized testing / awareness training / defensive use
- [ ] It does **not** add real-brand credential cloning, MFA-bypass/session
      hijacking, mass targeting, or detection-evasion aimed at attacking third
      parties

### Additional context

Mockups, links, or references that help explain the idea.
